metadata.title: Game da Arteon – Kayan aiki 10 kyauta don yanar gizo, SEO
metadata.description: Arteon hukumar kirkire ce da ke gina kayan aiki kyauta na browser: mai canza WebP, mai samar da favicon, mai gwada bambancin launuka, mai samar da lambar QR.

hero.title: Kayan aiki kyauta da hukumar kirkire ta gina
hero.description: Kayan aiki 10 na browser don hotuna, SEO, launuka, sa hannun imel da lambobin QR — ba sai ka yi rajista ba, ba sai ka loda fayil ba, ba iyaka

whoWeAre.title: Su wane ne mu
whoWeAre.p1: Arteon hukumar kirkire ce ta Poland. Bayan aikin kasuwancinmu, muna gina kuma muna kula da tarin kayan aiki kyauta da ke karuwa don masu kasuwanci, masu kirkiran shafukan yanar gizo, masu zane, masu talla da duk wanda ke aiki da abun ciki na dijital.
whoWeAre.p2: Kowace kayan aiki da muka kirkira tana magance matsala ta musamman ta yau da kullun: canza hotuna, gwada bambancin launuka, samar da favicon, kirkiran lambobin QR da sauransu. Manufarmu ita ce mu gina kayan aiki cikakku inda za ka sami komai da kake bukata a wuri guda — ba tare da canza tsakanin shafukan yanar gizo da yawa ba.

whyFree.title: Me ya sa muke bayar da kayan aiki kyauta

items.title: Ba rajista, ba iyaka
items.description: Kowace kayan aiki tana aiki nan take a cikin browser dinka. Ba a bukatar asusu, shiga ko biya.

items.title: Sirri da farko
items.description: Fayilolinka ba sa barin na'urar ka sam. Duk aiwatarwa tana faruwa a cikin browser — ba ma aika bayananku zuwa kowace uwar garke.

items.title: An gina su daga bukatu na gaske
items.description: Kowace kayan aiki ta fito daga matsala ta gaske da muka fuskanta yayin aiki akan ayyukan abokan ciniki. Idan mun bukace shi, mai yiwuwa kai ma kana bukatar shi.

items.title: Tallace-tallace na biyan kudin, kyauta a gare ka
items.description: Muna amfani da banners na Google AdSense don rufe kudin cigaba da hosting. Godiya ga kudin shiga daga tallace-tallace, duk kayan aiki suna kyauta.

items.title: Hotuna da favicon
items.description: Mai canza WebP, mai gyara hotuna da mai samar da favicon. Kayan aiki 3 don aikin hotuna na yau da kullun.

items.title: Meta da SEO
items.description: Mai gwada taken meta da bayanin tare da mai kidaya kalmomi da haruffa don tantance tsawon rubutu.

items.title: Imel da sadarwa
items.description: Mai samar da sa hannun imel na HTML tare da lambar da ta shirya don Gmail da Outlook.

items.title: Launuka da samun dama
items.description: Mai gwada bambancin WCAG, mai fitar da launuka daga hoto da mai samar da fayafayan launuka. Kayan aiki 3 don aiki da launi.

items.title: Bugu da kayan aiki
items.description: Mai samar da lambar QR don shafukan yanar gizo, vCard, menu da takardun talla. Fitarwa zuwa PNG da SVG.

whatsNext.title: Me ke gaba
whatsNext.text: Muna aiki sosai don fadada kayan aikin. Ana kara sababbin kayan aiki akai-akai bisa shawarwarin masu amfani da kwarewarmu. Manufar ita ce dandali guda daya inda masu kasuwanci, masu zane da masu haɓakawa za su sami damar samun kowace kayan aiki da ake bukata — duka a wuri guda, duka kyauta.

privacy.title: Sirri da tsaro
privacy.textBefore: Muna girmama sirrin ka. Fayilolin da ka loda zuwa kayan aikinmu ana sarrafa su ne kawai a cikin browser dinka kuma ba a taba aika su zuwa kowace uwar garke ba. Muna amfani da nazari (Google Analytics 4) da tallace-tallace (Google AdSense) ne kawai bayan ka ba da izini ta hanyar sanarwar kukis. Cikakkun bayanai suna samuwa a cikin

cta.title: Gwada kayan aikinmu
cta.description: Kayan aiki 10 kyauta — ba rajista, ba iyaka, ba loda fayil zuwa uwar garke
